name: Penn & Teller Dessert
recipeIngredient: Dark red wine or grape juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Make Jell-O using a double amount of the usual mix to achieve a thicker consistency.
2. Stir in cool whip until combined.
3. Pour into a standard dome-shaped mold.
4. Place a clean plastic bag filled with Karo syrup and dark red wine or grape juice into the mold, ensuring it remains on top.
5. Chill in the refrigerator until set.
6. Decorate with chocolate glaze and fresh berries before serving.
Enjoy this macabre dessert as a conversation starter at your dinner party!
